data_description.idle_stability_ms: Debounces brief Assist follow-up gaps before an announcement (0–5000 ms). A device that is already stably idle is not delayed.
data_description.satellite_entity_overrides: Optional JSON object mapping Home Assistant device IDs to assist_satellite entity IDs when a device has multiple satellites.
data_description.session_mode: How memory scope is derived: per device, per user, or per conversation
data_description.transport: Prefer WebSocket (enables barge-in and voice session registration) or SSE (stateless fallback)

error.invalid_idle_stability: Enter a whole number from 0 to 5000.
error.invalid_satellite_entity_overrides: Enter a JSON object whose assist_satellite entities are currently bound to the matching device IDs.
